gloss:
Pearl's composition axiom as an equation in the intervention algebra: if a variable already holds the value an intervention would set, that intervention changes no outcome. Reversibility is its companion.

**Cites** `WMSpec.Transform.pearl_composition` — the corpus theorem this result restates and discharges.

**Original contribution.** The raw lemma is a computation; the thesis-layer statement derives a second Pearl axiom internally as a word equation, continuing the reconstruction of the causal calculus from the intervention algebra.

statement.pretty: ∀ {U : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype U] {x : Bool} (M : WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM U) (u : U), WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.fX M u = x → WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.fY (WMSpec.Transform.doX x M) (WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.fX (WMSpec.Transform.doX x M) u) u = WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.fY M (WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.fX M u) u

title: Eidometry.Thesis.causal_pearl_composition
